Explanation: The question asks for the first interval of five years to have more than 100,000 deaths. Looking at the "deaths per year" column in the original table:
Row 1 (1950-1955): 66,000 (below 100,000)

Row 3 (1960-1965): 89,000 (below 100,000)
Row 4 (1965-1970): 105,000 (above 100,000)
Thus, the first interval to exceed 100,000 deaths is 1965-1970. The Prediction Answer of "null" is incorrect because there is a valid interval (1965-1970) that meets the condition.
